description: Alex Svanevik discusses the activity of various blockchains and the role of stablecoins in the market. He highlights the importance of understanding blockchain dynamics and the potential of tokenized assets.
topic_summary: In this video, Alex Svanevik, CEO of Nansen, explores the most active Layer 1 blockchains, the significance of stablecoins, and the evolving landscape of tokenized assets in the cryptocurrency market. He emphasizes the need for investors to analyze on-chain data to make informed decisions [t=271.56].
